name: continuous-improvement-dev
description: Development marketplace for the Continuous Improvement Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: continuous-improvement
plugins.description: Makes Claude Code reason harder, recall past corrections, and learn from every session so its competence compounds run over run. The Mulahazah engine turns each fix into a reusable instinct, so a lesson learned once is applied automatically next time — no re-teaching. Built on the 7 Laws of AI Agent Discipline (research, plan, verify, reflect, learn) and shipped as 25 bundled skills, instinct-aware hooks, an MCP toolset for recall and reflection, and a GitHub Action transcript linter that feeds real work history back into sharper instincts.
